experiences.title: Developer
experiences.description: Leading development of a Flutter-based mobile application, owning architecture, feature delivery, and technical direction. Developed an in-house system for MezzeDocuments, transforming static PDFs into structured, interactive in-app content to improve usability and content delivery. Designed modular architecture (data, domain, presentation layers) for scalability and maintainability, built structured data pipelines and caching systems for performance and delivery efficiency, and shipped production-ready features in Agile—translating stakeholder requirements into technical solutions.

experiences.title: Software Developer Internship
experiences.description: Worked across front-end development, business analysis, testing, UX, and project management within an Agile team. Contributed to internal systems and gained exposure to real-world software delivery and collaboration workflows, strengthening understanding of version control, delivery pipelines, and production environments.

experiences.title: Affiliate Executive & Software Developer
experiences.description: Developed Python automation tools to streamline outreach and web scraping, removing manual processes and improving efficiency. Optimised workflows by eliminating unnecessary stages, reducing operational complexity and improving scalability. Applied data-driven analysis to improve affiliate performance and support decision-making. Combined technical implementation with commercial insight to drive measurable improvements in productivity.
